text:
income. He would marry his uncle's (maternal) daughter. He would fall ill
and recover. His younger brother would die.
From his 27th year to his 33rd year, there would be benefits from the
Government. There would be a financial loss and much confusion. Later there
would be a tom of fortune for the better. Sons would be born to the native.
There would be further troubles. The children born would live long only if
the native performs propitiation to the deities.
His elder brother's wife would die. The native would become the father
of a daughter.
From his 37th year to his 44th year, there would be accumulation of
property. The native would build a house. His mother would die. There would
be a great improvement in his income and business due to the help of his
children. The native would be afflicted by disease. His wife would fall
seriously ill.
From his 44th year to his 48th year, the native would go on pilgrimage,
earn much wealth, engage many servants and live happily.
